title: Beautiful Young Woman Sadie Sink Long Wavy
sourceTitle: Beautiful Young Woman Sadie Sink Long Wavy
prompt: A beautiful young woman  [ Sadie Sink ] with long wavy ginger-red hair, fair skin covered in natural freckles on her face, shoulders, and arms, bright blue eyes, and a gentle smile. She is wearing a black off-the-shoulder lace crop top that reveals her shoulders and midriff, paired with light blue denim jeans. She has a delicate pearl necklace and a small red bracelet. She is sitting in a crowded concert arena at night, turned slightly to look over her shoulder at the camera with a soft expression. Dramatic concert lighting with stage lights and crowd in the background, cinematic atmosphere, highly detailed, photorealistic, 8k resolution, natural skin texture, realistic hair strands
